title: Getting started with Simulink
content: Search for “dash”it just becomes a part of the canvas.The scope just becomes a part of this canvas. And I can double click that block,and connect the signals that I would want to monitor, the plant signal, and the input signal. So this way, you don’t have to open up the Scope block. You could see the results directly in the canvas itself.,you have the option of what you want to see the results directly on the model itself. But your models are eventually going to get larger. So having the Scope block as a small way to get into it. So it really depends on your preference and the type of model that you’re working with. Pause Time Stop TimePause Time refers to the specific time in seconds at which the simulation will first pause, while Stop Time refers to the final time in seconds when the simulation will terminate. Once you start the simulation, it will first pause at the Pause Time, and you can click to continue running the simulation until it reaches the Stop Time. Cursor measurementsAnd that will bring in the cursor measurements that you want to analyze that signal, and so on. It’s useful when you are just doing signal analysis. Stepping optionsEnable stepping back and choose the stepping back here,by number any number of steps—I’m just choosing 50. Data Inspector （View Simulation History）

title: Quick Sort Algorithm
content: Give you a length of n The integer series. Please use Quick Sort to sort this series from smallest to largest. And output the sequence in order. Enter the formatThere are two lines of input, the first of which contains an integer n。 The second line contains n integers (all integers are in.) 1∼109 range), representing the entire series. Output formatThe output is a single line that contains n integers, representing ordered sequences. Data range1≤n≤100000 Input example:3 1 2 4 5 Sample output:1 2 3 4 5 #include iostreamusing namespace std;const int N = 1e6 + 10; int n;int q[N];void QuickSort(int q[], int l, int r) if (l = r) return; int i = l - 1; int j = r + 1; int x = q[(l + r) / 2]; while (i j) do i ++; while (q[i] x); do j --; while (q[j] x); if (i j) swap(q[i], q[j]); QuickSort(q, l, j); QuickSort(q, l + 1, r);int main() scanf(%d, n); for (int i = 0; i n; i ++ ) scanf(%d,q[i]); QuickSort(q, 0, n - 1); for (int i = 0; i n; i ++ ) printf(%d ,q[i]); return 0;

title: To Visitors
content: Though miles apart, true friends feel close at heart.Let this be the beginning — to keep moving forward without pause. Welcome. This is a small space for recording my learning and reflections. Algorithms, mathematics, technical practice, and occasionally some self-examination and quiet thoughts all leave their traces here. I am still learning, and still exploring. Many of my understandings may not yet be fully formed, and many expressions may fall short of completeness. Still, they are honest records of where I stand at this moment. If you happen to pass by, I hope that somewhere among these words. you might save a little time, or find a small spark of inspiration. Amid the vast sea of information, the chance to encounter one another here is already something rare. Welcome.

title: 致访客
content: 海内存知己，天涯若比邻以此为始，行而不辍 欢迎来到这里。 这是一处记录学习与思考的空间。算法、数学、技术实践，以及偶尔的自省与反思，都会在这里留下痕迹。 我仍在学习，也仍在摸索。许多理解未必成熟，许多表达也难言周全，但它们都是真实的阶段性成果。 若你偶然路过，希望其中某一段文字，能为你节省一些时间，或带来一点启发。 在浩瀚的信息之中，能够相遇，本身已是难得。 欢迎。
